agents.title: Custom AI Agents
agents.subtitle: Intelligent assistants that understand your business
features: Chatbots serving customers 24/7 in their language
Agents that query your database and answer in natural language
Automatic sales call analysis: what worked, what didn't

Reads and interprets invoices, contracts, and PDF reports automatically

software.subtitle: From manual processes to personalised intelligent systems

WhyUs.title: Why Skywalking
WhyUs.subtitle: Technology that empowers people, not replaces them. Measurable results, proven architecture.

speed.title: Speed over perfection
speed.description: Incremental implementations with measurable ROI in weeks, not months. Less code, more value.

simple.title: Simple solutions, real results
simple.description: We use what already works. Proven tools, no unnecessary complexity. Less code, fewer problems.

people.title: Technology empowers people
people.description: Software written with AI, designed and tested by humans. We expand the capabilities of your team.

eterhabitats.description: Sustainable construction in Patagonia. Recycled containers, sheep wool insulation, local materials. Interactive budgets and technical drawings.

kronos.description: Industrial weighing monitoring system. Device health, alerts, remote diagnostics. Multiple sites in one system.

igni.hint: When the forest speaks, you listen.
igni.description: Early wildfire alert system. Real-time monitoring to protect Patagonia.

micelio.description: The network that brings Artificial Intelligence to small and medium businesses. E-commerce, agents, and automation in one platform.

austral.description: Platform for the construction and materials industry. Quotes, stock, suppliers.
